name: Airik Crawford
bio: Eric Boyd Crawford Jr., professionally known as Airik Crawford, founded AAEC in March 2022. Raised on the West Side of Chicago, he approaches visual storytelling as an artist first, with a background in painting, design, composition, and creative theory from Knox College.
note: PLACEHOLDER — photo is a royalty-free silhouette (no identifiable face), NOT a real photo of Airik — deliberately chosen so the placeholder can't be mistaken for his actual likeness. Swap for his real portrait per assets/images/stock/CREDITS.md the moment it's received; do not leave the silhouette in place for a real launch. relatedWork is an optional array of {"title": ..., "href": ...} pairs pointing at /work/<slug>.html pages; the About page modal renders a "Related Work" list automatically once this is populated. Leave empty until real portfolio projects exist. Rest of the team (if any) needs bios/photos from Airik.
